value_input_option.description: How the input data should be interpreted. "RAW": The values will be parsed as if the user typed them into the UI. "USER_ENTERED": The values will be parsed as if the user typed them into the UI, but formulas will be calculated.

insert_data_option.description: How the input data should be inserted. "OVERWRITE": Overwrite existing data. "INSERT_ROWS": Insert new rows.

major_dimension.description: The major dimension of the values. "ROWS": Values are organized by row. "COLUMNS": Values are organized by column.

data_filters.description: The data filters used to select which ranges to retrieve from the spreadsheet

include_grid_data.description: True if grid data should be returned. Ignored if a field mask is set in the request

exclude_tables_in_banded_ranges.description: True if tables should be excluded in the banded ranges

spreadsheet_id.description: The ID of the spreadsheet to retrieve data from. Example: "1aBcD..."

range.description: The A1 notation or R1C1 notation of the range to retrieve values from. Example: "Sheet1!A1:C10" or "Sheet1"

values.description: The data values in the range, as a 2D array where each inner array represents a row

spreadsheet_id.description: The ID of the spreadsheet to update. Example: "1aBcD..."

sheet_id.description: The ID of the sheet to apply the rule to. If not specified, applies to all sheets.

index.description: The zero-based index of the rule to update or move.

new_index.description: The zero-based new index to move the rule to. Use this to reorder rules.

boolean_rule.description: A boolean rule - formats cells based on true/false condition.

gradient_rule.description: A gradient rule - formats cells with color gradients.

rule.description: The new conditional format rule. If provided, replaces the existing rule. If omitted, only moves the rule.

spreadsheet_id.description: The ID of the spreadsheet to update. Example: "1abc123def456ghi"

range.description: The A1 notation of the values to update. Example: "Sheet1!A1:B2"

values.description: The data to write, as an array of arrays. Each inner array represents a row. Example: [["A1", "B1"], ["A2", "B2"]]

value_input_option.description: How the input data should be interpreted. RAW = values as-is, USER_ENTERED = parsed as if typed into the UI. Default: USER_ENTERED

major_dimension.description: The major dimension of the values. ROWS = each inner array is a row, COLUMNS = each inner array is a column. Default: ROWS

include_values_in_response.description: If true, the response includes the updated cell values. Default: false

spreadsheet_id.description: The ID of the spreadsheet to update. Example: "1aBcD..."

range.description: The A1 notation of the range to search for existing data and append to. Example: "Sheet1!A1:E" or "Sheet1"

values.description: The row values to upsert. Example: ["Name", "Email", "Phone"]

key_column.description: The column index (0-based) to use as the key for matching existing rows. If not provided, always appends.

key_value.description: The value to match in the key column for updating an existing row. Required if key_column is provided.
